draftNote: 3 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane), Cuban Noobster (midlane→carry), Willy Guggenheim (offlane→jungle).

coaching.headline: A 43-minute loss decided on the map — towers 6-11 and you bled every late Prime to them. The long game slipped, not the draft.
coaching.team: You traded the early neutrals fairly evenly, but from 25 minutes on they took every late Prime (the 27, 33, and 38-minute Primal Fangtooths and the 39-minute Genesis Core) and out-towered you 11-6. That's a closing/teamfight problem, not an itemization one — anti-heal was covered (2 vs a single healer). Three players sat on a bottom-two lane (Mr_Meat support, Cuban mid, Willy offlane), which made the solo lanes a slog. Win the late setpieces or end before them.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Group for the late Primes as a five — that's where the towers and the game went.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Adele support into Mourn, 1/10/12 — behind at every checkpoint, and your only spike (Vainglory ~28m) came far too late to matter. Ten deaths on a backline enchanter is the game in one stat — stop facechecking and play from behind your frontline.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Legion carry, 13/5/5 and team-high 55k — the Sparrow lane was theirs at every checkpoint, but you got your Sky Splitter spike early (~12m) and farmed through it. Fine pick, it carried the scoreboard; the loss was the team's late map, not your lane. Funnel that damage into the late Primes you were losing.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Zinx mid into Gideon was theirs at every checkpoint and your Oathkeeper spike (~19m) was your only real power timing — an unfavored, uphill lane. Good enabling (14 assists), but you skipped armor into a 3-physical comp; build it so you survive the late fights.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Shinbi offlane was a favored matchup that you took over from 15 minutes on, but your spikes came late (Oathkeeper ~31m, Oblivion Crown ~37m) and you went 3/7 — the deaths put you behind in a lane you should have won, and the team lost the late Primes 0-for-3. Hold your won lane more patiently until those items land; the macro slipped late, but tighter offlane play keeps you in it.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera jungle into Bayle, 7/11/6 — yours early (the 10-15 minute checkpoints) then even after, so the lead was real before it faded, and eleven deaths fed their map control. When you're losing towers in the late game, stop committing to fights and finish your core (no Basilisk/Rapture) before you re-engage.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Mourn Abduct (pull), Bayle Kingslayer (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Mourn. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Yurei. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
You have sustain (Adele, Zinx) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
ourKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Anima Burst / Whispering Echoes apply Soul Rip → Severance resets on Soul-Ripped targets → Soulstorm pulls them in
enemyKits.winCondition: chain Severance resets to stick to a target and burst in melee
enemyKits.passive: casting grants ranged empowered basics + attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up CC to hold the target she dashes onto
enemyKits.playAgainst: her chain needs Soul Rip resets — peel/disengage breaks it; punish when Severance is on cooldown

enemyKits.combo: Abduct pull → Contagion ally-heal bugs → Beguile damage-reduction → Eclipse vision-denial ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and sustain the team through the brawl
enemyKits.playWith: burst that punishes his pulled target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect the long Abduct channel/range; anti-heal blunts Contagion

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
enemyKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps
